nutshell.headline: Nightly build broke at compilation — :compileJava failed, so no tests ran.
nutshell.causeText: The build stopped with a new compilation error in :compileJava before any tests executed (0 tests run, vs 1321 passing the prior night). The only change in this build is NXS-13454 (920eba60ace7) by gergely.gimesi, which edits Java Feign clients under src/main/java (TestFeigns.java, FeasibilityAdhocFeignClient.java, ProjectLogFeignClient.java, UrlPoolLeafFeignClient.java) — the plausible source of the Java compile break. This is not infra: there are no timeouts, 502s or 504s.
nutshell.investigation: The build failed at :compileJava (new) and 0 tests ran. The sole commit NXS-13454 by gergely.gimesi edits Java Feign clients, matching the Java compilation failure.
bullets: Build failed at :compileJava (new) — 0 tests ran (prior night: 1321 passed)
Not infra: no timeouts/502/504, a genuine compile error
Suspect: NXS-13454 (gergely.gimesi) edited Java Feign clients under src/main/java

detail.investigation: The build failed with statusText 'Compilation error: :compileJava (new)' and finished in 94s (vs 1854s the prior night), so the test phase never started and the summary shows 0 tests / 0 new failures. Reading the actual signal rather than the coarse count: this is a build break, not a test regression and not infra (no 'Read timed out'/SocketTimeout/502/504 anywhere). The build contains a single change, NXS-13454 (920eba60ace7) by gergely.gimesi, which modifies Java sources compiled by :compileJava — the Feign clients TestFeigns.java, FeasibilityAdhocFeignClient.java, ProjectLogFeignClient.java and UrlPoolLeafFeignClient.java under src/main/java — so a Java compile break maps plausibly to this commit. The commit also touches Groovy helpers/steps and non-code files (coverage.json, endpoints-overlay.json, PLATFORM_ASKS.md), but the Java Feign client edits are the ones relevant to a :compileJava failure. Next step: check the compileJava error log for the offending symbol/import in those Feign clients.
bullets: statusText: 'Compilation error: :compileJava (new)' — build never reached the test phase
0 tests ran (summary tests=0); prior build 3.0.2634 had 1321 passing, so tests normally run
Duration 94s vs 1854s prior — consistent with an early compile-time failure
No infra signals: no Read timed out / SocketTimeout / 502 / 504
Single change in build: NXS-13454 920eba60ace7 by gergely.gimesi
Java Feign clients edited: TestFeigns.java, FeasibilityAdhocFeignClient.java, ProjectLogFeignClient.java, UrlPoolLeafFeignClient.java (src/main/java) — compiled by :compileJava
Doc/data files in the same commit (PLATFORM_ASKS.md, coverage.json, endpoints-overlay.json) cannot cause a compile failure

likelyCauses.comment: [NXS-13454] MS - autotests - lifecycle, adhoc feas, processFile, and create coverage depth
